sources.antenna: TRUNK2 — sys3 alt CCs 858.8125 / 859.8125 MHz + voice 858.1–860.5 MHz

_notes: shortName '262' is the P25 hex sysid (MESA). Our API keys the DB on
sys_name from MQTT messages, so shortName must equal the hex sysid.
sysId must be decimal per trunk-recorder v5.x: 0x262 = 610, 0x6BD = 1725.
TRUNK0 gain MUST stay low (20 dB): the 856.8 MHz CC signal is very strong and saturates
the ADC at gains above ~25 dB, preventing P25 frame sync entirely.
Center at 857.3125 MHz puts CC at only -500 kHz offset (vs old 1 MHz) — critical for lock.
TRUNK1 gain 40 dB works for the 852.x voice channels at this site.
TRUNK2 covers the sys3 alternate CCs at 858.8125 and 859.8125 MHz that TRUNK0 misses.
Start gain at 20 dB (same caution as TRUNK0 — those CCs can be strong); bump if voice drops.
device: rtl=TRUNK2 — set once: rtl_eeprom -d 2 -s TRUNK2
To switch to Indiana SAFE-T (sysid 6BD / decimal 1725), update shortName,
sysId, talkgroupsFile, and control_channels from config/talkgroups/6BD.sites.csv.
device: rtl=TRUNK0 — set once per dongle: rtl_eeprom -d 0 -s TRUNK0
MQTT plugin: libmqtt_status_plugin.so is built into the jitr-trunk-recorder:local
image (see decoder/Dockerfile). The stock ghcr.io image does NOT include it.
